---
title: "Sponsors"
---

## Our Sponsors

We're grateful for the generous support of our sponsors, who make it possible to host events, provide resources, and build our mathematics community at UBC.

## Platinum Sponsors

[Sponsor logos and information to be added]

## Gold Sponsors

[Sponsor logos and information to be added]

## Silver Sponsors

[Sponsor logos and information to be added]

## Supporting Organizations

We also thank the following organizations for their ongoing support:

- Department of Mathematics, UBC
- Faculty of Science, UBC
- Graduate and Professional Students' Association (GPSA)

## Become a Sponsor

Interested in supporting the Math Society? We offer sponsorship opportunities at various levels that can help your organization:

- **Increase brand visibility** among talented mathematics students
- **Connect with top math talent** for internships and recruitment
- **Support mathematical education and community**

### Sponsorship Benefits

Sponsorship packages include:

- Logo placement on our website and event materials
- Recognition in our newsletter and social media
- Speaking opportunities at our events
- Dedicated booth space at major events

## Contact Us

For sponsorship inquiries, please reach out to us at [mathsoc@ubc.ca](mailto:mathsoc@ubc.ca)

---

*Thank you to all our sponsors for believing in mathematics education and community building!*
